---
title: "Rules"
---

## Scoring rules — Round 1 / Group stage

| Prediction result | Points |
|---|---:|
| Exact score | 3 |
| Correct goal difference | 2 |
| Correct winner / correct outcome | 1 |
| Wrong outcome | 0 |

Examples:

- Prediction: 2–1, actual result: 2–1 → 3 points
- Prediction: 2–1, actual result: 3–2 → 2 points
- Prediction: 1–0, actual result: 2–0 → 1 point
- Prediction: 2–0, actual result: 1–1 → 0 points
